title: Han, hun og Hamlet
writer: Lau Lauritzen, Alice O'Fredericks, A.V. Olsen
actors: Marguerite Viby, Hans W. Petersen, Olga Svendsen
plot: Fyrtårnet and Bivognen are gardeners at a residence for young women. Here they are friends with budding actress Eva, but when the three reveal one evening during the performance of an illegal theater performance, they are kicked o...
